items.name: JUMPSUITE OVERALL PBR COMMUNITY
items.description:
Perkumpulan Bocil Roblox Official Outfit

Outfit resmi komunitas PBR (Perkumpulan Bocil Roblox).
Dirancang sebagai jumpsuit komunitas supaya seluruh member tampil seragam, solid, dan beda saat event, party, atau foto bareng.

Mengusung gaya modern–skena Roblox, dengan kombinasi warna khas PBR dan detail simpel tapi standout.
Nyaman dipakai di berbagai avatar (R6 & R15) dan cocok untuk daily outfit komunitas.

Wajib dipakai saat event resmi PBR.

items.name: 4th of July Cape
items.description:
American or not, there's no better way of celebrating 4th of July than buying this cape. Go above and beyond with your patriotism when you show off this cape, and show everyone the true meaning and memories of being an American, grilling hotdogs, barbecuing burgers with friends, grow a garden, and launching fireworks, just make sure to keep them out of the dog's mouth! (Works in R6 and R15) 

Modeled and Textured by: Celisnix
